ASR Tactical 6pk Mini LED Stick On Lights, Battery Operated Magnetic Mount

Mini Stick On LED Lights with Magnetic and Adhesive Backing: 50 Lumens Each, Battery Operated, Compact Push Lights for Tactical Gear, Tool Boxes, Closets, RVs, Camping and Emergency Lighting by ASR Tactical.

Key Features

  • MAGNETIC MINI LIGHTS: Each blister pack includes six compact stick them anywhere mini lights, perfect for providing bright, reliable illumination exactly where you need it most
  • FLEXIBLE MOUNTING OPTIONS: Magnetic base for metal surfaces or adhesive stickers for non magnetic surfaces, install anywhere in seconds
  • BRIGHT 50-LUMEN OUTPUT: Energy efficient SMD LED technology delivers 50 lumens of bright light per unit, ideal for toolboxes, cabinets, RVs, boats and more
  • LONG-LASTING POWER SUPPLY: Each light operates on (2) CR2032 batteries (included), offering extended use while maintaining low energy consumption
  • QUICK & EASY OPERATION: Simple push ON and OFF button ensures instant lighting convenience with no complicated setup required

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRT-J4YQM5BZ
  • UPC: 810131705824
  • Color: Black

Bring bright, versatile lighting to any dark space with our Mini LED Stick On Lights. Designed for ultimate convenience, each blister pack comes with 6 compact LED lights powered by energy efficient SMD LED technology, delivering a 50 Lumen output per light for clear and reliable illumination.

Built to perform in rugged environments, each light features a 50-lumen output powered by long-lasting CR2032 batteries (included) for hassle free operation. The magnetic base securely attaches to any metal surface, while the included adhesive backing gives you the flexibility to stick them on virtually any non-magnetic surface. From glove boxes and tool kits to tackle boxes, RVs, boats, closets, or camping gear, these lights deliver the illumination you need in tight or dark spaces where traditional lighting falls short.

With a sleek black design that blends seamlessly into any setting, the Stick On Lights are an essential addition to tactical gear, survival kits, emergency preparedness kits or everyday carry gear. Compact, energy efficient and easy to use and install, these mini LED puck lights ensure you’ll always have light at the ready.
